content:
MODULE: cosmos.collaboration.multi_user
FILE: cosmos/collaboration/multi_user.py (520 lines)
CATEGORY: collaboration

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Multi-User Support - User Management & Profiles

Novel Approaches:
1. Personalized Responses - Adapt to user preferences
2. User Context Switching - Seamless multi-user handling
3. Preference Learning - Learn from interactions
4. Cross-User Privacy - Strict data isolation

CLASSES:
- UserRole(Enum): User roles with increasing privileges.
- UserPreferences: User-specific preferences.
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> dict
- UserStats: User activity statistics.
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> dict
- UserProfile: Complete user profile.
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> dict
- UserSession: Active user session.
  Methods: def is_expired(self) -> bool
- UserManager: Multi-user management system.

Features:
- User registration and authentication

  Methods: async def create_user(self, username: str, password: Optional[str]=None, email: Optional[str]=None, 
  Methods: async def authenticate(self, username: str, password: str) -> Optional[UserSession]
  Methods: async def authenticate_api_key(self, api_key: str) -> Optional[UserSession]
  Methods: async def create_session(self, user_id: str) -> Optional[UserSession]
  Methods: async def validate_session(self, session_id: str, token: str) -> Optional[UserSession]
  Methods: async def end_session(self, session_id: str) -> bool
  Methods: async def get_user(self, user_id: str) -> Optional[UserProfile]
  Methods: async def get_user_by_session(self, session_id: str) -> Optional[UserProfile]
